title: session — one Claude Code session
description: A BOUND type: records live in ~/.claude, not in data/. The schema is the meaning layer — the shape of a session as this workspace models it. Validated not against files in data/ but against what the reach returns: repo.sessions() (the catalog, a light projection) and repo.session() (the full detail). Both are subsets of the fields below, so both conform to this one type. See canon/anatomy.md § contained and bound substrates.

id.description: The session uuid — its transcript filename. Foreign id: minted by Claude Code, never by this workspace.

path.description: The authoritative cwd read from the transcript; folder names are lossy.

last_active.description: ISO local time of the transcript's mtime.

created.description: ISO local time of the transcript's creation.

idle_seconds.description: Seconds since last_active, at ask time.

age_seconds.description: Seconds since created, at ask time.

currently_active.description: mtime within CURRENTLY_ACTIVE_S (2s) — live right now.

last_response.description: The most recent assistant text reply (clipped).

has_summary.description: Joined from the summary kind: whether a summary record exists for this session.

summary_stale.description: Joined: the transcript has grown past the summary's watermark by the staleness threshold.

summary.description: Joined from the summary kind: the synthesis text, shown on the board.

started.description: First message timestamp — detail projection only.

last_message.description: Last message timestamp — detail projection only.
